title: Sable: Mass view (Create Aeronautics)
description: Shows Sable block mass in advanced block tooltips.
body:
**This addon for [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) (or Create Aeronautics)**

allows you to get the mass of all blocks of the Sable physics engine in the block's advanced hints.

![mass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/686508fda8ccffecf49e822082ddde572b424c60.png)
